name: Chile Tuna Sea Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni in 4 quarts of salted water until just done but still firm.
2. Drain and rinse the macaroni in cold water.
3. Combine all ingredients except the avocado and cilantro in a bowl.
4. Allow the mixture to sit for 2 hours to blend the flavors.
5. Garnish with the chopped avocado and cilantro before serving.
